Description: Add dropdown notification system to teacher dashboard matching the student's, and sync it with the teacher's full notification panel.
Instruction: 1. Add notify dropdown CSS. 2. Replace topbar notify-btn with dropdown. 3. Update panel-notifications to use full-notify-list. 4. Add notification JS logic.
